text.title: ViewSet Patterns
text.summary: ModelViewSet with get_queryset scoping, @action for non-CRUD verbs, and get_permissions for per-action permission classes.

rule.statement: Always scope get_queryset to the current user's data. Never expose Model.objects.all() directly in a ViewSet — it guarantees an IDOR sooner or later.
rule.rationale: An unscoped queryset allows any authenticated user to access any object by ID. Scoping in get_queryset applies to all ViewSet actions automatically.

rule.statement: Whitelist allowed HTTP methods on ModelViewSet via http_method_names. ModelViewSet exposes DELETE by default — agents copy-paste and accidentally ship destructive endpoints.
rule.rationale: The default ModelViewSet routes include DELETE. Unless deletion is explicitly required, restrict allowed methods to prevent accidental data loss endpoints.
